resources.string: This is a location-privacy tool, not a network control. It feeds a fake GPS point to apps that read your location. It works only while Understory holds the single \"mock location app\" slot — one app can hold it at a time.
Understory isn\'t the mock location app yet

To feed a fake location, this app must be selected as the OS mock-location app. Enable Developer Options and pick Understory under \"Select mock location app,\" or (if you use Shizuku) enable it from here. Only one app can hold this slot at a time.
Nudge the point a few metres each update so it doesn\'t look perfectly static.
Not feeding. Set a point and tap Start.
This app is now the mock-location app.
Enter a valid latitude and longitude first.
Another app holds the mock-location slot, or it was turned off. Re-select Understory to continue.
